events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Ringo Starr turns 86, one of the most iconic drummers in rock history, known for his work with The Beatles.

angles.name: Beatles Legacy
angles.copy: Ringo Starr turns 86, a true legend in the music world, let's take a look back at his incredible career with The Beatles.

events.title: Brian May turns 74
events.blurb: Brian May turns 74, the legendary guitarist and songwriter of Queen.

angles.name: Queen Icon
angles.copy: Brian May turns 74, the mastermind behind some of Queen's most iconic riffs, let's celebrate his birthday with some of their biggest hits.

angles.name: Rolling Stones Legend

events.title: MTV Launched 47 years ago

angles.name: MTV Revolution
angles.copy: MTV launched 47 years ago, changing the music landscape forever, let's take a look back at some of the most iconic music videos.

events.title: Anniversary Of Elvis' Death

angles.name: Elvis Tribute
angles.copy: Today we remember the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91, let's celebrate his life and legacy with some of his most iconic songs.

angles.name: Tupac Legacy
angles.copy: Tupac Shakur was shot dead in Las Vegas 30 years ago, leaving behind a legacy of powerful music and social commentary, let's take a look back at his most iconic songs.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Today we remember Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 83, a true rock legend, let's celebrate his life and legacy with some of his most iconic songs.
